articles.author: Chris Rosales
articles.title: Why Jeep's New Hurricane Four Turbo Engine Is Actually Insane - Motor1.com
articles.description: Using a mixture of F1-derived and high-performance technology, the Jeep Grand Cherokee's new base engine is a technical showcase.
articles.content: You know, with EVs and hybrids being such a thing right now, its rare to come across a genuinely cool new internal combustion engine that isnt made for something preposterously inaccessible, like Bug… [+6780 chars]
